data.name: MotorNexo
data.description: MotorNexo is a verified B2B auto parts marketplace built for the automotive repair ecosystem.
data.ownerRole: Dealer Principal / GM / Owner / Fixed Ops Director / Controller
icps: SELLER — Franchised dealerships with aged/excess parts inventory to monetize
BUYER — Body shops and collision centers needing fast OEM parts sourcing
